description: Demonstrate hex agents building real software while enforcing hexagonal architecture. Each task specifies layer, imports, and dependencies. Agent must follow architecture rules or code fails compile gate.

phases.description: Build pure domain logic with zero external imports
phases.name: P1: Domain Layer (Core Game Logic)

tasks.description:
Create src/domain/mod.rs. NO imports allowed (only use std built-ins if needed). Must define:

1. GameState struct with fields: secret: u32, guesses: u32, won: bool
2. impl GameState::new(secret: u32) → initializes all fields
3. GuessResult enum: TooLow, TooHigh, Correct
4. impl GameState::guess(&mut self, num: u32) → GuessResult { compares num to secret, updates won }
5. Unit tests: test_guess_correct(), test_too_low()

CRITICAL: This file must compile with ZERO imports besides std. It is the domain layer — pure business logic.
tasks.title: hex-coder: Write domain/mod.rs — Game state machine
hex-coder: Write ports/mod.rs — Dependency injection traits

phases.description: Implement RNG using external rand crate
phases.name: P3: Secondary Adapter (Random Number Generation)

tasks.title: hex-coder: Write adapters/secondary/mod.rs — OS random source
hex-coder: Write adapters/primary/mod.rs — Stdio UI
hex-coder: Write adapters/mod.rs — Module declaration

phases.description: Wire domain logic with port traits
phases.name: P5: Usecases Layer (Orchestration)

tasks.title: hex-coder: Write usecases/mod.rs — Game orchestration
hex-coder: Write src/main.rs — Composition root

tasks.description:
Write Cargo.toml:

[package]
name = "hex-game"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"

[dependencies]
rand = "0.8"
tasks.title: hex-coder: Create Cargo.toml

tasks.description:
Run: cargo build --release. Binary must compile without errors. Then test:
echo -e '50
75
88
94
97
99' | ./target/release/hex-game

Expected output: welcome message, feedback (too low/high), invalid input handling.
tasks.title: hex-coder: Compile and test game

tasks.description:
Run: hex init . && hex analyze .

Verify output shows ZERO violations. Architecture must pass validation:
- domain/ has no imports
- ports/ imports nothing
- adapters import ports only
- usecases imports domain+ports only
- main.rs imports adapters
- NO cross-adapter imports
- NO forbidden dependency directions
tasks.title: hex-coder: Run hex analyze to validate architecture

title: hex-coder builds hexagonal game autonomously
